title: SOL 6pk Interior Dehumidifier Fragranced, 400ml Damp Traps Moisture Absorbers Multipack for Wardrobe in Lavender, Citrus, or Fresh Linen Scents, Prevents & Condensation, Ideal for Home & Small Spaces
features: Universal Moisture Absorbers for Home - Our scented moisture absorber dehumidifier disposable can pull in a massive condensation from your windows, cupboard or car. These mini dehumidifiers disposable have a 400ml capacity and are highly effective.

Collects Moisture In The Air - Manage the humidity with our humidity absorber dehumidifier. These moisture absorbers for home collect condensation at the same time gives off a cleaner & lavender, rose, or citrus scent. Be surprised how much damp they can collect.

Prevent Mould & The Resulting Health Consequences - Our interior dehumidifiers disposable dehumidifier is useful in removing moisture in the air that allows mould to flourish. Stop mould from growing by windows with our window condensation remover

No More Musty Smells - Reduce damp and stale smells and replace with Lavender, Citrus, Rose Scent. It's moisture absorbers for home, window condensation absorber, damp traps multipack, moisture traps for home, humidifiers for home damp, dehumidifier pack

A Solution for Poorly Ventilated & Heated Homes - If you have windowless bathroom, or poorly heated house, these damp absorber dehumidifier bags will work well to take excess moisture from walls & ceiling and keeps the are smelling either lavender, citrus, or rose.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Fresh Scents Interior 2 Achieve Dryness & Comfort Disposable Dehumidifiers: Convenient Moisture Control Solutions 6pk Interior Dehumidifier Add To Basket 3pk Interior Dehumidifier Buying Options Dehumidifier Hanging Bags Buying Options 3pk Interior Dehumidifier Buying Options 12pk Dehumidifier Bags Buying Options 12 Interior Dehumidifier Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 135 4.0 out of 5 stars 28 4.5 out of 5 stars 149 3.9 out of 5 stars 52 4.0 out of 5 stars 666 4.0 out of 5 stars 28 Price £9.99 £ 9 . 99 — — — — — Portable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Scented ✔ ✘ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✘ Small Spaces ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Easy to Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Multipack ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ How does the dehumidifier help with condensation? The dehumidifier absorbs moisture from the air, reducing condensation on windows and other surfaces, preventing damp and musty smells. What scents are available in this dehumidifier pack? The pack includes Lavender, Citrus, and Rose scents, offering a pleasant aroma while effectively reducing moisture. Can these dehumidifiers prevent mould growth? Yes, by absorbing excess moisture, these dehumidifiers help to prevent mould growth in poorly ventilated or humid spaces. Where can I use these dehumidifiers in my home? These dehumidifiers are ideal for use in wardrobes, bathrooms, cupboards, and other areas prone to moisture and dampness. How long does each dehumidifier last? The longevity depends on the moisture levels in the area. Once the absorber is full, simply replace it to maintain a dry environment.
